mapper.sql: o.id AS id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.team_id AS teamId, o.team_name_snapshot AS teamNameSnapshot, o.org_name_snapshot AS orgNameSnapshot, o.service_title AS serviceTitle, o.quote_desc AS quoteDesc, o.final_amount AS finalAmount, o.currency AS currency, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.payment_status AS paymentStatus, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(o.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt, c.id AS caseId
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM service_order WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM service_order WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM service_order o LEFT JOIN student_service_case c ON c.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.student_user_id = #{studentUserId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM service_order o LEFT JOIN student_service_case c ON c.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM service_order o LEFT JOIN student_service_case c ON c.order_id = o.id WHERE o.student_user_id = #{studentUserId} ORDER BY o.updated_at DESC, o.id DESC

SELECT , o.student_user_id AS studentUserId, ua.phone AS studentPhone, sp.name AS studentName FROM service_order o LEFT JOIN student_service_case c ON c.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = o.student_user_id LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.user_id = o.student_user_id WHERE o.org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY o.updated_at DESC, o.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE service_order SET service_title = #{serviceTitle}, quote_desc = #{quoteDesc}, final_amount = #{finalAmount}, assigned_member_id = #{assignedMemberId}, order_status = 'WAITING_PAYMENT', payment_status = 'UNPAID' WHERE id = #{id} AND org_id = #{orgId} AND order_status = 'PENDING_QUOTE'
UPDATE service_order SET order_status = 'PAID', payment_status = 'PAID', paid_at = COALESCE(paid_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE id = #{id} AND payment_status != 'PAID'
UPDATE service_order SET order_status = 'IN_SERVICE' WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status IN ('PAID', 'IN_SERVICE')
